zh.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯托普特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Stanley於大約1407年出生在英國爾時，她的父親William de Stanley VI23歲，母親Alicia Houghton21歲。她和John Warren III至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1459年之後在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯托普特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Stanley于大约1407年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲William de Stanley VI23岁，母亲Alicia Houghton21岁。她和John Warren III至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1459年之后在英国英格兰爾斯托普特，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Stanley was born about 1407, in Cheshire, England, her father, William de Stanley VI, was 23 and her mother, Alicia Houghton, was 21. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with John Warren III. She died after 1459, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Stanley est née environ 1407, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Stanley VI, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alicia Houghton, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec John Warren III. Elle est décédée après 1459, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Stanley um 1407 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Stanley VI 23 und ihre Mutter Alicia Houghton 21. Sie hatte mit John Warren III mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1459 in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Stanley è nata il circa 1407 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, William de Stanley VI, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alicia Houghton, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con John Warren III. Morì dopo il 1459, nel Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Stockport, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルト
ja.Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイア
ja.Poynton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアポイントン
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Stanleyが約1407年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Stanley VIは23歳，母Alicia Houghtonは21歳であった。彼女はJohn Warren IIIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1459年以後にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Stanley(이)가 대략 1407년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Stanley VI(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alicia Houghton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John Warren III(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Stockport, Cheshire, England: Stockport, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Stanley nasceu aproximadamente 1407, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Stanley VI, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alicia Houghton, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com John Warren III. Ela faleceu após 1459, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Stanley родилась около 1407 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Stanley VI было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alicia Houghton, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от John Warren III. Она умерла после 1459 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Stanley nació aproximadamente 1407, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Stanley VI, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alicia Houghton, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con John Warren III. Murió después de 1459, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
